title: Git workflow
description: Opinionated git habits: safe fault attribution, loss-proof diffs, and one-PR-per-cluster batching. Two policies in this pack are consequential enough to need individual confirmation.

memories.reason: changes commit attribution for the whole repo — strips AI co-author trailers from every commit the agent makes
a CI-bypass policy: merges hotfixes as soon as mergeable without waiting for checks — many teams explicitly forbid this
